description_long: This is a tan work boot with a rugged, lugged rubber sole and a high ankle collar, designed for durability and support. The upper is made of light brown leather with visible stitching and reinforced eyelets for the yellow laces, which are threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern. The padded collar is black, providing additional comfort and contrast to the tan body. The boot sits on a piece of worn, light-colored wooden flooring, which highlights its utilitarian, urban character. A small, embossed logo is visible on the outer side near the heel, suggesting a recognizable brand. The boot shows signs of light use, with some dirt and scuff marks on the leather and sole, but remains structurally sound.
description: A tan leather work boot with yellow laces, a black padded collar, and a rugged lugged sole, showing light wear and urban utility.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan leather upper, black padded collar, yellow laces, and embossed logo near the heel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the toe box, lacing system, and symmetrical shape of the boot.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the stitching, padded collar, and sole profile.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the heel, back seam, and padded collar wrapping around the ankle.
attribute_logo: Embossed tree logo on the outer heel, tan color matching the leather.
